_comment: Canonical declared brand x desktop-platform matrix for build-cadence.yml. Source of truth for which brand+platform pairs MUST stay in the cadence rotation, independent of whether catalog.json has any release history for them yet -- without this, a brand with zero releases (or a platform a brand hasn't shipped on yet) never enters rotation, since the old logic derived pairs purely from existing history (chicken-and-egg). Update this file when a new brand or desktop platform is added. Android/web have their own delivery paths (Play Console internal track, Firebase Hosting on every push) and are intentionally not covered here.
